chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-88 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.1746/2019 2. For order on office objection at flat ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1747/2019 4. For hearing of main case 01-04-2019 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Shahani, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2 to 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he approached to SSP Sukkur for lodging of FIR against the respondents No.5 to 8 by narrating the facts of cognizable offence on 15.03.2019, which was marked by him to I/C Inquiry Cell but till date no progress has been made. At the very outset, learned counsel was put on notice to satisfy on the point of maintainability of this petition as appropriate remedy is available to him under section 22-A(i) Cr.P.C. He states that after announcement of Judicial Policy, the Ex -officio Justice of Peace is not entertaining the applications. I am afraid that Ex-officio Justice of Peace is bound to entertain such applications, if despite making approach to concerned SSP, the petitioner remains unsatisfied or in case his grievance is not redressed by the SSP concerned, the remedy is available to him under the statute in terms of section 22-A (i) Cr.P.C. This petition is therefore disposed of directing the petitioner to approach the concerned Ex-officio Justice of Peace for the redressal of his grievance in accordance with law. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
